creator: so@server.i-clue.de
text:
Apologies indeed. I used misconfigured squid, which had this page
cached, it was several weeks old. Disregard my previous mail.

-Christoph Sold

Christoph Sold schrieb:
> 
> > State-Changed-Why:
> > This was reported in PR 24652 and committed last month by des.
> > Thanks anyway though.
> 
> I disagree, a quick check in the cvsweb interface shows this change is
> in -current only. It needs to be MFC'd ASAP to go into 4.3-Release.
> 
> Apologies for being a pest ;)
> -Christoph Sold

-- 
Freundliche Grüße aus Waiblingen

Christoph Sold
